name: Hunter
description: The wilderness is your home, prey your conversation. Every track tells a story, every movement a potential meal. You've learned to become one with the hunt, to survive where others would perish.

feats.name: Hunter's Mark
feats.description: Once per **respite**, you mark the target with your chosen marking tool, guiding your weapons to their heart. While the target is **Marked**, you can add 1d4 to damage and attack rolls. If the target escapes, you have **Resolve** to track them for two hours.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
